description_long: This is a cubic parcel box with a white base color, prominently featuring the text 'UNIVERSITY OF XR WESTMINSTER' in bold black letters across its faces. The front face displays large 'XR' lettering, with three colored squares to the right labeled 'VR' in magenta, 'AR' in teal, and 'MR' in yellow, each with white text. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard or paperboard, suitable for shipping or promotional purposes. The surface is smooth and matte, with crisp, high-contrast printed graphics. The overall design is modern and visually striking, likely intended for branding or event use.
description: A white cubic parcel box with bold 'UNIVERSITY OF XR WESTMINSTER' text and colorful 'VR', 'AR', 'MR' labels on the side. The surface is smooth and features modern, high-contrast graphics.
description_view_0: The front face shows the full 'UNIVERSITY OF XR WESTMINSTER' text and the colored 'VR', 'AR', 'MR' squares clearly.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, but the right edge of the box is more visible, showing the colored squares extending further.
description_view_2: The top of the box is more visible, with the 'UNIVERSITY OF XR' text partially wrapping onto the upper face.
description_view_3: The left edge is more prominent, with the colored squares and 'XR' text still visible but slightly angled.
